column1: Ernie Clement stands out as the most reliable pick, hitting safely in nearly three-quarters of his games and showing strong recent form at the plate. He benefits from a favorable home matchup with the platoon advantage against Sean Manaea. Jake McCarthy also offers solid consistency leading off for Colorado in a hitter-friendly park with the platoon edge. Jackson Chourio’s high rate of games with a hit keeps him in the mix for those seeking additional options.
